name: ndabene-portfolio
description: Portfolio de Nicolas Dabène - Senior PHP Developer & AI Orchestrator

scripts.build:css: ruby -e "require 'sass'; scss = File.read('assets/css/style.scss').split('---', 3).last; css = Sass::Engine.new(scss, {syntax: :scss, cache: false, read_cache: false, filename: 'style.scss', load_paths: ['_sass', '.'], style: :compressed, precision: 10, quiet_deps: true}).to_css; File.write('_site/assets/css/style.css', css)"
scripts.build:full: npm run build && npm run build:css
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build:full

author: Nicolas Dabène
